Package bupt.ta.util

package bupt.ta.util
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    bupt.ta
    BUPT International School teaching assistant recruitment system.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    CsrfTokenManager
    Issues and validates session-bound CSRF tokens.
    InterviewCalendarSupport
    Builds simple iCalendar payloads for interview appointments.
    InterviewNoticeTimeSupport
    Normalizes the MO interview notice time sent to shortlisted applicants.
    InterviewScheduleSupport
    Normalizes the MO posting form's estimated interview time.
    JobActivity
    Whether a job is still "active" for MO day-to-day management (My Jobs).
    JobSelectionCapacity
    Shared helpers for enforcing selected-TA capacity on a posting.
    JobWorkloadEstimator
    Estimates expected hours per selected TA for a job from structured work arrangements (same basis as MO work-quota planning).
    MoApplicantListControls
    Sort and filter controls for MO applicant lists on the jobs management page.
    MoJobsRedirectParams
    Query parameters for MO jobs redirects (e.g.
    PasswordHasher
    PBKDF2-based password hashing with a self-describing storage format.
    PaymentSupport
    Normalizes structured payment inputs on the MO posting form.
    RememberMeCookie
    Persistent cookie for "remember me" login (path matches web app context).
    WorkArrangementSupport
    Builds derived Job text fields from structured work arrangements and recalculates planned recruits.
    WorkQuotaPlanner
    Builds a balanced workload recommendation from work-arrangement rows.
    WorkQuotaPlanner.Recommendation
    Summary of one recommendation run (API surface for JSP / callers).
    WorkQuotaPlanner.TAQuota
    One virtual workload share: running total hours and per-work-name counts.
